name: Zoom
description: Sync meetings, recordings, users, and webinar data from Zoom using Server-to-Server OAuth.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Exchange account credentials for a Bearer token and probe GET /accounts/me.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Probe GET /accounts/me and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE. Updates the circuit breaker.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full paginated sync of Zoom meetings and recordings into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Users
methods.description: List active users in the Zoom account.

methods.name: List Meetings
methods.description: Paginated list of Zoom meetings for a user.

methods.name: List Recordings
methods.description: Paginated list of cloud recordings for a user.
